```python
class HttpOptions(
    *,
    base_url: str | None = None,
    base_url_resource_scope: ResourceScope | None = None,
    api_version: str | None = None,
    headers: dict[str, str] | None = None,
    timeout: int | None = None,
    client_args: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
    async_client_args: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
    extra_body: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
    retry_options: HttpRetryOptions | None = None,
    httpx_client: HttpxClient | None = None,
    httpx_async_client: HttpxAsyncClient | None = None
)
```
---
HTTP options to be used in each of the requests.

```python
class HttpRetryOptions(
    *,
    attempts: int | None = None,
    initial_delay: float | None = None,
    max_delay: float | None = None,
    exp_base: float | None = None,
    jitter: float | None = None,
    http_status_codes: list[int] | None = None
)
```
---
HTTP retry options to be used in each of the requests.
